scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (customers, subscriptions, invoices); the full Zoho Billing surface (plans, addons, coupons, credit notes, payments, items, hosted pages, webhooks) is out of scope until Pass B. zoho-billing has no allow-listed write actions in legacy (read-only connector).
